message:
Fix stats API: batch SQL variables ≤100, index blob sizes at unpack time

- Reduce getFileSizes SQL batch from 500 to 100 (Cloudflare DO SQLite limit)
- Add getCommitCount() using SQL COUNT(*) instead of walking R2 commit graph
- Index blob sizes in SQLite during packfile unpack so stats() hits cache
- Stats API 10K files: 21.6s → 728ms (29.8x faster)
